Package com.sunilos.p4.util

Class ServletUtility

java.lang.Object
com.sunilos.p4.util.ServletUtility
public class ServletUtility extends Object
This is a utility class that provides basic servlet operations like forward, redirect, generic exception handling, access success and error messages, set and get default Bean and List objects, manage pagination parameters
Version:
1.0
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma
